description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. The workflow should have two jobs: python-tests and cpp-tests, both running on ubuntu-latest. The python-tests job should cancel previous runs, check out the repository, set up Python 3.9, install dependencies, install The Walrus, run tests with pytest and coverage, and upload coverage to Codecov. The cpp-tests job should cancel previous runs, check out the repository, install Python 3.9, install C++ dependencies, build and run C++ unit tests.
